form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Most recently 9th of 11 at Townsville Bm60 on March 15 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 3.5 len behind Impressionism carrying 57.5kg at $26. The run before that raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 14 at Townsville Bm55 on March 5 over 1200m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Aspen Cowboy carrying 59kg at $20. Nicely placed and cannot be underestimated.

Hard to beat again.
